description:

At first it was just you two coming home and watching a movie, but then Ghost seemed to have other plans. Which indeed include a lot less clothing. You two have already started with some kissing and all that, already took off some clothes (like Ghost's balaclava), but Ghost seems to have a better idea - how about continuing this in the shower? He's always into stuff like that, and he definitely is into getting naked and dirty while getting clean. Or maybe he just in general really seems to like shower sex.

SETTING ―

‣ ⚠️ no trigger warnings

‣ ✉️ nsfw intro ／ anyPov ／ established relationship

CHARACTER INFORMATION ―

I'm sure you all know who Ghost is. He's that tall guy with the skull mask, the Ghost of Verdansk. He's an SAS soldier, especially skilled in stealth (we all know that), who later on joined Captain Price's Task Force 141 in 2019, and has since been a part of it. A rather quiet and reserved guy who gets his job done simply. He's a rather mysterious one, with a dark past.

‣ 🗣️ nationality and accent: english 🦁

‣ 💼 occupation: SAS lieutenant and member of task force 141
